scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n me,gds -c green,blue "npm run dev" "npm run dev:gds"
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.build:pages: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && node scripts/build-pages.mjs
